wp1.name: Project handbook
wp1.description: Outline of project management protocols, communication channels, and primary governance bodies.

wp1.name: Data management handbook
wp1.description: Procedures and best practices for data handling in the project.

wp1.name: Ethics handbook
wp1.description: Specific ethics guidelines to be followed by partners during the project.

wp1.name: Year 1 management report
wp1.description: Progress report outlining the overall activities during the first project year.

wp1.name: Year 2 management report
wp1.description: Progress report outlining the overall activities during the second project year.

wp1.name: Year 3 management report
wp1.description: Progress report outlining the overall activities during the third project year.

wp2.name: Initial report on requirements and definition of requirements for PROSPERO architectural components and associated solutions
wp2.description: State of the art synthesis, requirement definition, and first description of PROSPERO components and solutions.

wp2.name: Initial architecture of PROSPERO, new business models and refinement of requirements
wp2.description: Initial definition of architectural modules, procedures, and refined requirements.

wp2.name: Final architecture of PROSPERO and definition of business models
wp2.description: Final definition of the PROSPERO architecture.

wp3.name: Description of solutions exploiting PROSPERO architecture components
wp3.description: Discussion of project strategic paradigms and their integration in the PROSPERO architecture.

wp3.name: Initial design of solutions exploiting PROSPERO architecture components
wp3.description: Initial design of PROSPERO solutions in the context of the architecture designed by the project.

wp3.name: Final design of solutions exploiting PROSPERO architecture components
wp3.description: Final design of PROSPERO solutions and their integration in the defined architecture.

wp4.name: Initial report on evaluation frameworks and tools
wp4.description: Definition of the PROSPERO evaluation strategy, tools, and datasets.

wp4.name: Initial evaluation of solutions exploiting PROSPERO architecture components
wp4.description: Initial implementation of PROSPERO solutions and discussion of the final evaluation plan.

wp4.name: Final evaluation of solutions exploiting PROSPERO architecture components
wp4.description: Final implementation of PROSPERO solutions and discussion of final evaluation results.

wp5.name: Communication, dissemination and exploitation plan (CoDEP)
wp5.description: Definition of the PROSPERO communication, dissemination, and exploitation strategies.

wp5.name: Report on communication, dissemination and exploitation results and updated CoDEP for Y1
wp5.description: Report on activities performed during PROSPERO Y1 and analysis of business cases with relevant stakeholders.

wp5.name: Report on communication, dissemination and exploitation results and updated CoDEP for Y3
wp5.description: Report on activities performed during PROSPERO Y2 and initial verification of the business cases.

wp5.name: Final report on communication, dissemination and exploitation results
wp5.description: Final report of communication, dissemination, and exploitation activities, including final validation of business cases.
